name: senderkit
description: Skills for integrating SenderKit transactional messaging into apps and operating SenderKit through MCP.

interface.longDescription: SenderKit provides agent skills for adding transactional messaging to applications and safely using SenderKit MCP tools for sends, templates, status checks, and pending-message cancellation.
defaultPrompt: Add SenderKit transactional messaging to this project.
Migrate my email provider to SenderKit.
Send a test message and check its status via SenderKit MCP.
